sentiment.summary: Equities retreated as U.S.-Iran tensions reignited, spiking oil on Strait of Hormuz fears—while Bitcoin surged 4% as crypto attracted risk-on flows away from stocks.

insights.text: Geopolitical fears drag equities lower as oil spikes. U.S.-Iran tensions erased Monday's rally. S&P -0.7%, NASDAQ -0.5%. Oil surged ~$3.67 on Strait of Hormuz supply fears. BTC +4% bucked the trend on crypto safe-haven flows.

BTC breaks $70K on risk-on crypto rotation. Up 4.1% to ~$70,900—still 3% below your $73,135 cost. Crypto diverging bullishly from equities. A push through cost basis is in play if geopolitical fears ease and momentum holds.

$190M DoD HASTE deal secured but $1B ATM dilution hits the stock. RKLB -4.3% to $66.45, still above your $62.04 avg. $1.85B backlog up 73% YoY is rock solid. Dilution is the near-term drag; Neutron Q4 2026 is the real catalyst.

EchoStar holds near $110 despite a messy Q4 earnings miss. EPS -$1.03 vs -$0.75 est.; $14.5B non-cash losses weigh. S&P 500 inclusion and $125 median analyst target cushion downside. At $109.85, slightly below your $114.33 cost basis.

Norway 50MW grid assignment is a legit catalyst for T1 Energy. Shares at $6.84, just above your $6.73 avg. Earnings March 31 could be a big mover. G2_Austin ramp and 396MW interconnection queue give this real upside. Watch the print closely.

Record Q2 results—but STX is still 10% below your $448.98 cost basis. At ~$405 after an 11.5% EPS beat and $2.83B revenue record. AI nearline storage fully committed through 2026. CEO sold $10M in shares March 23—a yellow flag to monitor.

$1.7B debt wall due Dec 2026—existential threat for Telesat. Creditors suing over Lightspeed asset transfer; launch delayed to late 2026. At $36.08, up 8% from $33.33. Consider whether near-term gains are worth holding through a refinancing cliff.

Share authorization doubled today—BBAI bleeds to $3.69, down 59% from your $9.02 cost. $293.9M net loss in FY2025 with no clear path to profitability. CargoSeer is speculative upside only. Deep underwater; reassess position sizing.

Meta $12B contract + BofA BUY rating ($150 target) validate the NBIS thesis. At $114.64, still 12.6% below your $131.12 cost. Nvidia partnership and $4B convertible notes show elite institutional conviction. AI infra is structural—hold and be patient.

NRC license + 59% EPS beat, but OKLO sits 55% below your $125 cost at $56.26. $1.41B cash runway; Aurora reactor advancing through approvals. Potential 1.2GW Meta deal in Ohio could be transformative. Multi-year hold—high conviction required.

CFO departure overshadows NVIDIA GTC AI momentum for Navitas. NVTS at $8.98, near your $10.00 cost. New 800V GaNFast and 1200V SiC products target AI datacenters—thesis intact. Leadership transition is real risk; watch for Q1 guidance stability.
